opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My mouth feels like it is on fire, I have these huge white sores everywhere, and I cannot even swallow my own spit without crying.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain in my mouth has got so bad overnight that I haven't been able to drink anything all day, and paracetamol does nothing.

symptom_narrative.onset: a sore mouth started about three days ago and it has got dramatically worse in the last 24 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days, but the ulcers and the inability to swallow are since this morning
symptom_narrative.character: burning, raw mouth with big deep white-yellow sores on my tongue and cheeks; swallowing anything is agony
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst mouth pain I've ever had — I cry when I try to swallow my own saliva
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over the inside of my mouth — tongue, cheeks, and the back of my throat
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse with any movement of the tongue or attempt to swallow
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — paracetamol hasn't touched it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: swallowing, talking, and anything warm or textured
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: thick stringy spit that I keep having to dribble into a tissue, and I feel really drained and wiped out
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: my mouth was a bit tender a few days ago but nothing like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can still move around the house but I can't eat or drink and I'm slurring my words because it hurts to move my tongue

past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: currently on treatment — about 10 days into this cycle
past_medical_history.how_managed: under an oncology team; had my chemo about ten days ago

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: chemotherapy (given by my oncology team about 10 days ago)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about coping because I can't eat or drink and there's no one here with me

objective_data_offered.value: 37.4 C on my home thermometer a little while ago
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer; borderline and could rise — repeat monitoring needed

objective_data_offered.value: big white-and-yellow sores over the tongue and inner cheeks with red swollen surrounding tissue; mouth looks raw
no fluids kept down since this morning — roughly 14 hours; untouched glasses of water and supplement drinks nearby
thick ropy saliva that I keep dribbling into a tissue; mouth feels very dry
